external_geometry.claim: control datum only; not asserted to be a complete classical tetrahedral geometry

internal_q_data_allowed_to_vary: relative orientation of the two channel operators
claim_firewall: Away from theta=pi/4 this is not called standard SU(2)_k TQFT.
The operator pair is a minimal algebraic envelope, not a claimed unique volume operator.
A nonzero intrinsic derivative is not an observable-identifiability certificate.
